case_title: GEORGE THIBODEAUX VS. BRIDGESTONE RETAIL OPERATIONS, LLC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY THIBODEAUX, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGESTONE RETAIL OPERATIONS, LLC DBA WHEEL WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIDGESTONE RETAIL OPERATIONS, LLC DBA WHEEL WORKS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIBODEAUX, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIDGESTONE RETAIL OPERATIONS, LLC DBA WHEEL WORKS $1,097.99 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,142.99, PLAINTIFF WAS ABLE TO PRESENT EVIDENCE FROM A SECOND OPINION - BERKELEY RADIATOR WORKS - THAT THE RADIATOR THAT WAS RELACED WAS NOT LEAKING. THE MONEY SPENT ON THE RADIATOR PART AS LABOR IS REFUNDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GEORGE THIBODEAUX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIDGESTONE RETAIL OPERATIONS, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHUHYAN YI STORE MANAGER & LUCITO DAVID, TECH SUPPORT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
